creator: freebsd@troll-poilu.fr
text:
Created attachment 220164
upgrade ldb20 to 2.0.12

Hi,

Here is a patch to upgrade databases/ldb20 from 2.0.10 to 2.0.12.

This upgrade is needed if you want to make samba 4.11 with external ldb in this version.

I have test the patch on my poudriere with success.
